author: Erin Skidds
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Create files in specific folders with optional date prefixing/suffixing, PDF creation from templates, and Kanban board creation. Can also embed attachments in existing files.

manifest.author: Erin Skidds
manifest.description: Create files in specific folders with optional date prefixing/suffixing, PDF creation from templates, and Kanban board creation. Can also embed attachments in existing files.
manifest.name: File Creator

name: File Creator

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
If you have Obsidian 1.13.0+ you can now use the built-in Settings Search to search for any of the settings!

With this update I have reorganized the settings and created a way for you to create templates straight from the settings! They create in the file you specified in the template path and if that folder doesn't exist yet, it creates the folder.

When you enable a file type to create you can see the corresponding settings, when you disable it, they hide.

Excalidraw documents are created with everything necessary so you can immediately create sketches in your vault.
releases.name: 1.3.6 - TONS of Updates!

# Visual bug fix!

This is just a minor release to fix the fact that kanban settings were not in an accordion like the rest of the settings. Nothing else changed.
releases.name: Minor Release!

releases.author: DudeThatsErin
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DudeThatsErin/FileCreator/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

# 🐛 Bugfixes

There were some commands that were not working properly - they are now. Also, I made everything smoother and all modals and settings pages look cleaner.

# 🆕 New Commands

You can create a new file like always from the command palette or you can just create new file types from the command palette utilizing the defaults you have in the settings of the plugin.

You can now also create Kanban Files that work with the Kanban Plugin, Excalidraw Files that work with the Excalidraw plugin and NEW Base files that work if you are on any of the 1.9+ releases.

> **NOTE:** While the base option will show up for you on a 1.8 or earlier release it will just output a file that Obsidian cannot read.
releases.name: FileCreator can now create more files types!

releases.author: DudeThatsErin

releases.name: Minor Release - Just bug fixes

releases.author: DudeThatsErin
releases.description:
## 🎉 Release: File Creator v1.1.0

This is the first official release of **File Creator**, a simple yet powerful plugin for creating files in your Obsidian vault with advanced options.

### ✨ Features
- Create Markdown or PDF files
- Select from any folder in your vault
- Ignore folders from dropdown
- Add date to filename (prefix/suffix/none)
- Use templates for both Markdown and PDFs
- Auto-open created files

### 🔧 Configurable Settings
- Default file type and date format
- Default templates
- Folder paths for template sources
- Folders to ignore in picker

📦 Install with [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat):  
`https://github.com/DudeThatsErin/file-creator`

📬 Community plugin submission pending!

🛠️ [View on GitHub](<https://github.com/DudeThatsErin/file-creator>)
releases.name: Release: File Creator v1.1.0

releases.author: DudeThatsErin
releases.description: There were minor bugs I didn't realize I had. They are now fixed.
releases.name: Fixed bugs!

releases.author: DudeThatsErin
releases.description:
It is uploaded to the plugin store and ready to be reviewed!

You can create a blank PDF or markdown file with this prefix or suffix it with the date and put it in any folder you want.

I use this and my Explorer Enhancer plugin to hide all of my folders and just have base files of my folders and then this allows me to create new files from the base files in the folder that I am looking at and then start working in that file.
releases.name: Released this plugin!
